title: SACRAMENTO, CA —

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "There have been 300 mass shootings in 2022 thus far.",
    "The surge in gun violence comes as firearm purchases rose to record levels in 2020 and 2021, with more than 43 million guns estimated to have been purchased.",
    "The rate of gun deaths has hit the highest level since 1995, with more than 45,000 fatalities each year.",
    "California has passed new gun safety laws aimed at tackling gun violence.",
    "The Legislative Gun Violence Prevention Working Group has successfully passed numerous new gun safety laws since its founding in 2019.",
    "AB 2156 closes loopholes that currently allow individuals and corporations to manufacture large numbers of firearms without complying with standard manufacturer requirements.",
    "AB 1929 expands funding for lifesaving gun violence prevention efforts by providing Medi-Cal reimbursement for violence prevention programs.",
    "AB 2571 prohibits the marketing of firearms to children and minors.",
    "AB 452 requires the California Department of Education to provide notifications regarding safe firearm storage.",
    "AB 1621 increases public safety by further restricting 'ghost guns' and the parts and kits used to build them.",
    "AB 2551 requires the Department of Justice to notify local law enforcement of attempted firearms and ammunition purchases by prohibited persons.",
    "AB 2552 ensures proper background checks and increases the safety and oversight of gun shows in California.",
    "SB 915 enacts a total ban on gun shows held on all state property in California.",
    "SB 1384 strengthens gun dealer safety standards by requiring federally licensed firearm dealers to carry general liability insurance and on-site digital surveillance systems.",
    "AB 1594 empowers California citizens, the California Attorney General, and local governments to sue manufacturers and sellers of firearms for harm caused by their products when state law isn’t followed.",
    "Gun violence is the leading cause of death for children in the United States.",
    "Safe storage of firearms can save lives."
  ]
}
```
